description: IN2U for Her by calvin klein is a citric fragrance that has notes of lime, pomelo leaves, citron, and white musk, adding a fresh new dimension to citrus-based perfumes. A champagne gold fragrance in a delectable flacon wit plastic encasing, this fragrance is a love-forever classicQuantity: 100 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
